subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-04-30 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: His life [Khalil's] was an example of honesty and activity... This man [Abdullah] lives in Baghdad and was notorious for his evil deeds... This man [Isma'il] was the well-known architect of Farrokh Khan in Tihran...
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @hospitality
